title: Config Inherit and Footer Details
description: Add explicit inherit model configuration and footer-driven active sub-agent transcript details.

work_packages.title: Config inherit mode
work_packages.description: Add explicit inherit support to persisted sub-agent slots, config TUI selection, and dispatch slot resolution.
verification_commands: npx vitest run test/unit/config-schema.test.ts test/unit/config-auto.test.ts test/unit/slot.test.ts test/unit/tool-schema.test.ts
work_packages.rationale: Config schema, TUI saving, and dispatch resolution share one slot contract and should be changed and verified together.

work_packages.title: Footer details navigation
work_packages.description: Add keyboard navigation from the below-input running status into active sub-agent list and transcript-focused details.
verification_commands: npx vitest run test/unit/footer.test.ts test/unit/overlay.test.ts test/unit/interrupt.test.ts test/unit/transcript.test.ts test/unit/widget.test.ts
work_packages.rationale: Footer focus, panel navigation, Escape handling, and transcript rendering form one interactive TUI flow with shared keyboard state.

phases.name: Config inherit mode
phases.description: Sub-agent slots can explicitly inherit parent model and thinking while preserving concrete slots and per-dispatch overrides.

tasks.title: Support inherited slot resolution
tasks.description: Extend the persisted slot contract and resolver so any configurable sub-agent slot can explicitly inherit parent provider, model, and thinking. Preserve concrete slots, general-purpose default inheritance, and per-dispatch override precedence.
acceptance_criteria: Config parsing accepts and reloads explicit inherit slots while keeping existing concrete slot configs valid.
A slot configured to inherit resolves to the parent provider, model, and thinking level.
A concrete configured slot still resolves to its configured provider, model, and thinking level.
Per-call provider, model, and thinking overrides take precedence over inherited and concrete slot configuration.
general-purpose still inherits by default when no explicit concrete or inherit slot exists.
tasks.context: Covers REQ-1, REQ-2, REQ-4, REQ-5, AC-2, AC-3, and AC-4. The user wants inherit as a first-class config choice without regressing dispatch-time override behavior.

tasks.title: Expose inherit in subagent config
tasks.description: Update `/subagent-config` so every configurable slot offers an inherit option. Selecting inherit must save durable inherited state and skip thinking selection; selecting a concrete model must keep the existing thinking selection behavior.
acceptance_criteria: The model selection list includes an inherit option for every slot in the config flow.
Selecting inherit saves a reloadable config state used by dispatch.
Reopening the config flow with an inherited slot recognizes inherit as the current slot state.
Selecting inherit skips the thinking picker for that slot.
Selecting a concrete model still prompts for and saves a thinking level.
Default suggestions continue to provide a concrete explore slot and leave general-purpose inherit-by-default behavior intact.
tasks.context: Covers REQ-1, REQ-2, REQ-3, REQ-5, AC-1, AC-5, and AC-6. The TUI should make inherit obvious without making users choose a redundant thinking level.

phases.name: Footer sub-agent details
phases.description: The below-input running status becomes a keyboard path into active sub-agent selection and transcript details.

tasks.title: Add footer status navigation
tasks.description: Make the below-input `⟳ N running` status keyboard-navigable when the editor is empty and sub-agents are active. Down focuses the status, Down or Enter opens the active list, and Escape or Left closes/backtracks before abort handling. Keep the above-input tracker unchanged.
acceptance_criteria: With an empty editor and active sub-agents, Down focuses the below-input running status.
Down is not consumed for footer navigation when normal editor input should keep it.
When focused, Down or Enter opens the active sub-agent list.
Left Arrow backs out and closes according to the current navigation level.
Escape closes or backs out of the footer/details widget before active-sub-agent abort handling.
The above-input active tracker behavior and rendering remain unchanged.
tasks.context: Covers REQ-6, REQ-7, REQ-8, REQ-12, REQ-13, AC-7, AC-8, and AC-12. The user specifically wants to navigate from the below-input status, not change the existing tracker, and approved only activating Down when the editor is empty.

tasks.title: Show transcript-focused subagent details
tasks.description: Update the active sub-agent list and drill-down view so arrows select agents and Enter or Right opens a selected detail view. The detail view shows metadata, task text, and a bounded formatted recent transcript excerpt without separate activity/tool/output/file sections.
acceptance_criteria: The active list supports arrow-key selection and Enter or Right Arrow drills into the selected sub-agent.
The detail view shows status, alias, model, cwd, elapsed time, usage, and wrapped task text.
The detail view includes a readable formatted recent transcript excerpt directly in the same level.

Transcript display reads at most the last 64 KiB of persisted `output.jsonl` data, ignores partial or malformed JSONL lines, formats the last 20 displayable events in chronological order, and renders at most 30 wrapped lines.
Transcript display handles empty or unreadable transcript data with a fallback.
Left Arrow from detail returns to the active list, another Left closes the widget, and Escape closes or backs out before active-sub-agent abort handling.
The detail view omits current activity, active tools, last tool call, latest output, and file path sections.
Transcript rendering uses sanitized persisted transcript data and does not show hidden reasoning content.
tasks.context: Covers REQ-9, REQ-10, REQ-11, REQ-12, REQ-13, REQ-14, AC-9, AC-10, AC-11, AC-12, and AC-13. The user preferred formatted recent transcript content directly in the selected agent detail view and approved the 64 KiB / 20 event / 30 wrapped line bounds.
